name: warpos
description: WarpOS — autonomous AI operating system for software engineering. Registry-driven hooks, transactional updates, honest release gates, generic promotion.
notes: Patch release closing the architecture-drift loop opened by the 2026-05-01 audit. Highlights: (1) installer derives paths.json + warpos version from registries — no more hand-rolled paths object. (2) New hooks.registry.json drives hook-manifest.json + .claude/settings.json + warp-setup hookConfig from a single source of truth. (3) /warp:update gained source-tree-root walk, real migration runner, post-update check execution, transaction record + rollback notes, honest MERGE_SAFE/MERGE_CONFLICT semantics. (4) /warp:promote stripped of hardcoded source-repo names; detects label dynamically. (5) Path lint covers .ts/.tsx/.sh/.ps1/.yml/.yaml. (6) /warp:sync deprecation finalised. (7) Reference-integrity gate marked manual (was lying as green). No schema bumps — additive only.
